testcase.name: test

error.message: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression //yt-formatted-string[contains(text),'Subscribe']'] because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '//yt-formatted-string[contains(text),'Subscribe']']' is not a valid XPath expression.
